project_context: Estimate validated stories before coding-agent handoff in local standalone mode.

epics.epic_description: Secure the estimation workflow and improve audit visibility.

user_stories.title: Require OAuth and role checks for estimate approval API
user_stories.description: Protect the estimate approval API with OAuth client credentials, permission mapping, and secure audit logging for every approval action.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Approval API rejects requests without a valid OAuth token
Only configured reviewer roles can approve or reject estimates
Approval decisions are captured in the audit log with actor and timestamp

user_stories.title: Show estimate change history in admin dashboard
user_stories.description: Add an admin dashboard page where users can filter estimate change history by release and export the filtered results as CSV.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Admins can filter estimate changes by release and team
Filtered data can be exported to CSV
Dashboard only shows records the user is allowed to view

epics.epic_description: Keep approved estimates synchronized with delivery systems.

user_stories.title: Retry Jira and ADO estimate sync failures
user_stories.description: When an approved estimate fails to synchronize to Jira or Azure DevOps, retry with backoff, surface status to operators, and allow replay of dead-lettered events.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Transient sync failures retry automatically with backoff
Operators can view retry and dead-letter status
Dead-lettered sync events can be replayed safely

stories.title: Add helper text under estimator confidence badge
stories.description: Show a brief explanation under the confidence badge so planners understand how to interpret high, medium, and low confidence levels.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Helper text is visible beneath the badge
